overall.description: A cinematic view from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a rainy, foggy night in a futuristic neon-lit city. The camera slowly pans left from a high-rise balcony overlooking the downtown district, with an elevated monorail track crossing the foreground. Red neon lights and holographic billboards illuminate the scene as heavy rain creates atmospheric haze throughout the clip.

events.description: holographic billboard cycles to new advertisement content

agents.ego_description: standing on an elevated balcony, slowly panning the camera left to survey the rainy cityscape

entered.detail: dark metal elevated railway structure spanning horizontally across the upper portion of the frame
multi-story building facade illuminated with bright red neon lights and yellow structural elements
large glowing advertisement screen displaying changing commercial content with white and orange hues
tall futuristic glass tower with illuminated windows rising into the foggy night sky
rounded multi-level structure with green and blue neon lighting visible in the mid-ground below the track

segments.scene_description: From a high-rise balcony in a futuristic cyberpunk city, the camera slowly pans left across a rain-soaked urban landscape. Red neon lights illuminate the left-side buildings while holographic billboards glow on the right. The scene is enveloped in fog and heavy rain, with an elevated monorail track crossing the foreground and distant skyscrapers fading into the mist.

events.description: monorail train passes by on the elevated track from right to left

agents.ego_description: continuing to observe the cityscape as a train passes overhead

notable_agents.action: monorail train with yellow carriages moving rapidly across the elevated track from right to left

segments.scene_description: A monorail train with yellow-orange carriages suddenly enters the frame, moving quickly across the elevated track that spans the foreground. The train passes from right to left against the backdrop of the neon-lit city, adding dynamic motion to the otherwise static rainy night scene.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a slow, sweeping pan across a rain-soaked cyberpunk skyline that shifts from a static atmospheric vista to a scene of sudden urban motion. It begins from a high-rise balcony, gliding leftward over a landscape of red neon buildings and glowing holographic billboards shrouded in heavy fog. As the camera continues its movement, the distant skyscrapers fade further into the mist while the elevated monorail track remains prominent in the foreground. The scene then transforms as a monorail train with yellow-orange carriages suddenly streaks across the frame from right to left. This burst of speed cuts through the rainy haze, adding a dynamic layer of activity to the neon-lit city before the shot concludes.
